Mission

# Elysium makes the benefits of aging research accessible to you.

Our mission is to translate critical scientific advancements in aging research into accessible health products and technologies.

Working directly with the world’s leading scientists, clinicians, and institutions, we develop clinically validated solutions that address some of the most significant needs in healthcare.

As an interdisciplinary group, we leverage a multi-factor approach to address the multi-factor problem of aging.

## Why Now?

Why now? Because we believe that scientific advancements in the field of aging research are leading to compelling new developments that will fundamentally redefine every aspect of how we think about healthcare.

Landmark scientific discoveries in the past 20 years — from the field’s first Nobel prize to the identification of the hallmarks of aging and the early indications of the ability to reverse aging — offer a path to novel, proactive health solutions.

We founded Elysium because we believe everyone should have the benefit of direct access to this compelling research. Working in partnership with the world’s leading scientists and research institutions, Elysium is creating a new category in the health industry by translating advances in science into effective products we can easily incorporate into everyday life.

We believe this is an entirely new approach to health and wellness.

## Science, Our Core Value

A fully-loaded product pipeline in various stages of clinical development, Nobel Prize-winning advisors, partnerships with Oxford and Yale — and much more. At the heart of each one of our initiatives is a commitment to scientific rigor and open collaboration. This foundation enables Elysium to establish a fundamentally new approach to scientific discovery and support our customers in their pursuit of lifelong health and wellness.

## How It Started

It started with baker’s yeast, or saccharomyces cerevisiae. Elysium co-founder and chief scientist Dr. Leonard Guarente had just finished his Ph.D. at Harvard and was opening a research lab at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT). It was 1982, and his decision was ahead of the curve: Most aging studies at the time used comparative biology to learn about the difference between old animals and young. Few scientists were trying to understand the genetic and molecular causes of aging.

So why did he start with yeast? Well, it turns out we share the same ancestor as yeast dating back about a billion years, and believe it or not, many really important genes (or very similar ones) found in yeast are also found in other organisms, including humans. They are “conserved” in evolutionary terms, which means they have universal functions in many or all species.

At Elysium Dr. Guarente works with his co-founders, Eric Marcotulli and Dan Alminana, and the Scientific Advisory Board, to aggressively pursue a research agenda focused on translating scientific findings into products people can access in the near term.

![](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0268/1811/7694/files/Lenny_Guarente_in_Lab.jpg?v=1628853352)

Elysium’s co-founder and chief scientist, Dr. Leonard Guarente, is the director of the Paul F. Glenn for Biology of Aging Research at MIT.

### Dr. Guarente found a really important gene called SIR2. It took him and his postdocs eight years.

In 1999, Dr. Guarente’s lab found that if they activated the SIR2 gene, yeast would live longer. Soon after this discovery, they found that SIR2 required a molecule called NAD+, which is found in all living cells, to function. Without NAD+, SIR2 did nothing.

In the years that followed it became clear how important this work was. There are SIR2-related genes that encode proteins called sirtuins in all organisms. Humans, it turns out, have seven of them. They’re found in different parts of the cell and they all do slightly different things, but they all require NAD+ and all are essential to human health.

“Sirtuins are kind of like an orchestra working together to produce a symphony, but each piece, each section, has its own role,” Guarente says. “Together you get a great unified outcome.” At the time of Dr. Guarente’s original discovery there were a few hundred scientific papers on sirtuins. Now there are more than 12,000.

### These discoveries about the role of sirtuins and NAD+ are the foundation for Basis.

At Elysium Dr. Guarente works with his co-founders, Eric Marcotulli and Dan Alminana, and the Scientific Advisory Board, to aggressively pursue a research agenda focused on translating scientific findings into products people can access in the near term.

![]()

# General Research Consent Form

Our mission is to make critical scientific advancements in the field of aging accessible to consumers. In support of this work, we engage in a wide variety of research, study, and observation internally or in collaboration with third parties (collectively "Elysium Research" and/or "Aging Research Center by Elysium Health"). We invite and enable our customers to voluntarily contribute to and become a part of various Elysium Research aimed at making and supporting meaningful scientific discoveries. In order to participate in any Elysium Research, you must agree to the terms in our [Privacy Policy](/policies/privacy-policy) and this Consent Form. Capitalized terms not defined in this Consent Form have the same meaning as in our [Privacy Policy](/policies/privacy-policy) and [Terms of Service](/policies/terms-of-service).

## 1. What information will be used or shared if I consent?

If you consent to participating in Elysium Research, we will use and/or share the Information we collected directly from you or automatically pursuant to our Privacy Policy for Elysium Research. Specifically, such information may include but not limited to the following:

**Important Note About Identifiability of Images, Photographs and Visual Data**

While we take steps to protect your privacy, photographs of people (especially those of facial features or characteristics) may inherently contain identifiable features and may not be fully de-identifiable.

To help reduce privacy risks, please DO NOT upload images of other people, and submit images that:

When we share your Information for research purpose, we will de-identify such information by, for example, assigning a random ID, whenever feasible. "De-identified information" means information that cannot reasonably be used to infer information about or otherwise be linked to you. However, (a) some data types (such as photographs of facial features or characteristics) may not be capable of full de-identification; and (b) in certain cases, removing identifying elements would prevent meaningful research use. Under these circumstances, de-identification would not be possible, but we will implement applicable and reasonable safeguards to protect your Information.

## 2. What is Elysium Research?

We may engage in both internal and external research to, for example, develop new tests and products, develop new applications and features of existing products, improve our products and services, validate technologies, improve existing technologies or processes, or develop new ways to diagnose and treat disease and other conditions.

**Internal Research**: Internal Research refers to the research conducted by Elysium Health or its affiliate internally, with or without the help of our service provider or contractor (e.g. Laboratory). As an example of internal research, a customer that opts in may receive a survey with various questions about demographics, lifestyle, health conditions, medical history, etc., with the goal of potentially looking for correlations of these traits with their DNA methylation patterns, correlations that may eventually lead to the development of new applications and features on the Index platform.

**External Research**: External Research refers to the research conducted by Elysium Health or its affiliate in collaboration with its outside research collaborators or partners on select research projects. As an example of external research, the above outlined correlations between survey responses and DNA methylation patterns may lead to new findings in the academic and/or medical communities.

By agreeing to this Consent Form, you hereby agree to participate in the Internal and External Research, and consent to the use and share with our service providers, contractors, outside research collaborators, and other institutions, entities or persons involved in the relevant Elysium Research your Information to conduct such Elysium Research.

## 3. Who are the outside research collaborators?

Our third party research collaborators include universities, hospitals, health systems, government institutions, non-profit organizations, or private companies. When we share your Information with these collaborators, we will make sure that they are contractually obliged to safeguard such information according to the law. These research collaborators will also be contractually prohibited from trying to re-identify you in any way or sharing your data outside the approved research.

## 4. Can I change my mind?

Yes, you may withdraw your consent to this Research Consent Form at any time by calling [(888) 220-6436](tel:+18882206436) or emailing [privacy@elysiumhealth.com](mailto:privacy@elysiumhealth.com). Specifically, you may either: (i) withdraw the disclosure of your Information to third party for External Research purposes but still consent to our collection, use and process your Information for our own Internal Research; or (ii) withdraw the collection, use, process and disclosure of your Information for our entire Elysium Research (i.e. both Internal and External Research). If you withdraw from the Internal Research, you automatically withdraw from the External Research.

Please keep in mind that your withdrawal will not affect the lawfulness of our collection, use, processing, and disclosure based on consent before your withdrawal (e.g. your Information will not be removed from ongoing or completed research studies which started before we receive your request to delete your Personal Information). The Test Information, Self-Report Information and/or other information that you have previously provided and for which you have given consent to use in our research cannot be removed from completed studies that use that information. Your data will not be included in studies and research that start more than 30 business days after your account is closed (it may take up to 30 business days to withdraw your information after your account is closed).

Choosing not to give consent or withdrawing your consent to this Research Consent Form will not affect your use of the Elysium Test you already purchased. However, if you decide not to consent or to leave Elysium Research early, we may not be able to use your data to allow you to compare your Elysium Test results with the entire community of people who have taken the same Elysium Test.

## As Seen in the News

We’re pleased that our products are regularly featured in the press as groundbreaking developments in the field of health, wellness, and aging.

* > “The opportunity is the chance to make a difference by translating findings in the booming field of aging research directly to consumers today.”
* > “It's the brands that prioritize science-based products — like Elysium — that are setting a new standard for the industry.”
* > "Most impressively, the company’s co-founder is Leonard Guarente, who heads MIT’s aging center and is one of the pioneers of aging science, a contender for the Nobel Prize should geroscience ever get a nod from the Swedish academy.”
* > “Elysium collaborates with world-renowned international academic institutions to maintain the highest standards of practice, and their thought leadership is helping change the conversation in preventive health and wellness.”

## Science 101

Your source for information about NAD+, sirtuins, and other important topics in aging science.

* [![](//ca.elysiumhealth.com/cdn/shop/files/What_is_NAD_Thumbnail.jpg?v=1730740479&width=832)

  ### What is NAD+ and Why Is it Important?

  > NAD+ is essential to the creation of energy in the body and the regulation of pivotal cellular processes. Here’s why it’s so important, how it was discovered, and how you can get more of it.](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/what-is-nad-and-why-is-it-important "https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/what-is-nad-and-why-is-it-important")
* [![](//ca.elysiumhealth.com/cdn/shop/files/TN_NMN_and_NR_Which_One_Should_You_Take.jpg?v=1730740459&width=832)

  ### NMN and NR—Which One Should You Take? Maybe Both

  > There are differences between the two most popular NAD+ precursors. Learn the distinctions and what supplementing with each—or both—of them can do for you.](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/nmn-and-nr "https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/nmn-and-nr")
* [![](//ca.elysiumhealth.com/cdn/shop/files/TN_Maintaining_the_Integrity_of_Your_Mitochondria.jpg?v=1730740441&width=832)

  ### Maintaining the Integrity of Your Mitochondria

  > Our body contains trillions of tiny organelles called mitochondria.  Mitochondrial function is essential for metabolic health, cellular energy creation, and so much more – here’s why.](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/maintaining-the-integrity-of-your-mitochondria-the-powerhouses-of-the-cell "https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/maintaining-the-integrity-of-your-mitochondria-the-powerhouses-of-the-cell")
* [![](//ca.elysiumhealth.com/cdn/shop/files/TN_What_is_Metabolism.jpg?v=1730740413&width=832)

  ### What is Metabolism?

  > Metabolism is the sum of every chemical reaction in your body. Learn how it works and science-based tips to support it.](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/what-is-metabolism "https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/what-is-metabolism")

## 25+ Internationally Renowned Scientific Advisors

In addition to a scientific advisory board that includes eight Nobel Prize-winning scientists, we work directly with the world’s leading scientists and clinicians to develop our products.

 [Meet the Scientists](https://elysiumhealth.com/pages/advisory-board)

## Institutional Partnerships Include Oxford and Yale

 [Educational partners](https://elysiumhealth.com/pages/science)

## NSF for Sport Certification & 3rd-Party Tested for Purity & Quality

 [Quality](https://www.nsfsport.com/certified-products/search-results.php?keyword=elysium+health)

## 13 Ongoing and Completed Human Clinical Trials

 [Clinical Trials](https://elysiumhealth.com/pages/science)

Shop All Products](/collections/all)





Who we are

# Meet the Elysium team.

### The Elysium team is made up of individuals who are passionate about creating a fundamentally new approach to healthcare, one that focuses not exclusively on disease but on health.

We tackle challenges with creativity, integrity, and a willingness to collaborate. We believe that aging is not only the greatest risk factor for all major chronic conditions, but that aging research represents the most significant opportunity to improve human health today. It is our responsibility to share the benefits of aging research with as many people as possible, to effect real and meaningful change. This includes our colleagues, our families, and our friends—who were the original inspiration for Elysium.

We are solving some of the world’s most interesting and important problems, and believe no one should assume that because a problem is hard, it’s unsolvable.

## Leadership Team

* ### [Eric Marcotulli](/blogs/leadership-team/eric-marcotulli)

  CEO
